steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The claim is that The Grass Dancer resembles magical realist novels through juxtaposition — realistic fiction set alongside Dakota traditions that function as antirealistic elements. The correct choice must illustrate exactly that pairing.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — misattributes the traditions' source: places the antirealistic elements outside Dakota culture, contradicting the passage. ✗
  • Choice B — realistic conventions alongside Dakota traditions that transcend realism: directly shows the juxtaposition the claim requires. ✓
  • Choice C — emphasizes alternation, not juxtaposition: the novel switches between modes rather than holding both at once. ✗
  • Choice D — treats them as competing influences: frames the two elements as in conflict rather than coexisting. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
